mainmatter.p: The notion of a (meta-)category is an essentially algebraic theory. As such it is possible to compute models of this theory in any category that has finite limits.
Let \(E\) be a category with finite limits; then an internal categoryin \(E\) is defined by the following data:

ol.li: satisfying a number of laws corresponding to those of a category.

mainmatter.p: For the details of these laws, we refer to any standard source.
